```python
def parse_log_message(log_message):
    """Extract the template for the given log message."""
    log_message = log_message.replace(' ','<*> ')
    log_message = log_message.replace('(', '<*>')
    log_message = log_message.replace(')', '<*>')
    log_message = log_message.replace(':', '<*>')
    return log_message
```
